name: dev
description: Multi-agent development team with project-aware knowledge, framework packs, and 4-phase execution flow

project-manager.description: Oversees build execution, resolves blockers, and coordinates team

software-architect.description: Owns system design, module boundaries, and architectural decisions

frontend-tech-lead.description: Assigns frontend tasks, enforces UI patterns, reviews frontend output

backend-tech-lead.description: Assigns backend tasks, enforces API and data patterns, reviews backend output

qa-lead.description: Owns test strategy, acceptance criteria, and final QA validation

security-reviewer.description: Reviews code for security vulnerabilities, auth issues, and data exposure risks

devops.description: Manages CI/CD, infrastructure config, environment setup, and deployment

ux-qa.description: Validates UX quality, accessibility compliance, and interaction patterns

design-ux.description: Owns UI/UX design decisions, component design, and brand application

documentation-specialist.description: Writes and maintains technical docs, README files, and API references

pencil.description: Pencil design tool MCP - Untitled UI design-to-code translation for visual design workflows

neon.description: Neon Postgres MCP - Database schema management, migrations, and query optimization

railway.description: Railway MCP - Deployment management and infrastructure operations

next-devtools.description: Next.js DevTools MCP - Framework-specific development assistance for Next.js projects

eslint.description: ESLint MCP - Code quality and linting for JavaScript/TypeScript projects

tailwind.description: Tailwind CSS MCP - Utility class reference and design system integration

hooks.command: echo 'dev: File updated. If this completes a phase, update state.yml.'
